title: Kanwar Sanctuary
tagline: Kanwar Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Himachal Pradesh

overview.short: The Kanwar Sanctuary is located in Parbati valley of Kullu district.
overview.description: The Kanwar Sanctuary is located in Parbati valley of Kullu district. R.O. wildlife Kasol provides information and help to visitors. Uphill walk along Garahan Nala from Kasol through dense Deodar and Fir forests is worth. The sanctuary has large population of Himalayan Tahr.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Chanderkhani
topPlaces.description: Chanderkhani Pass (Hindi: चंद्रखनी दर्रा) is a pass located in the Kullu District of India at a height of 3,660 metres. It forms a way (pass) between the villages of Rumsu and Pulag to the well known village of Malana, which indirectly forms a trekking route from Naggar to Malana across the Chanderkhani Pass.

items.note: Chanderkhani Pass (Hindi: चंद्रखनी दर्रा) is a pass located in the Kullu District of India at a height of 3,660 metres. It forms a way (pass) between the villages of Rumsu and Pulag to the well known village of Malana, which indirectly forms a trekking route from Naggar to Malana across the Chanderkhani Pass.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kanwar Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kanwar Sanctuary is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kanwar Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kullu-Manali Airport (Bhuntar) (17 km) and the nearest railway station is Chandigarh Railway Station (149 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kanwar Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kanwar Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kanwar Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Kanwar Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.
